name: Trap Beat 1
code:
bpm = 124

//*Drums*

// Hi-hat

oh(.5,tram('..x. .x.[..] ..x. .x.[x...]',2)) |> chorus($,rate:.255,spread:.3) |> stereo($,.012) |> out($*0.8) 

// Kick

trig=tram('x... .x.. x..x .x.[x.]',2) sine(52+100k*ad(.0009,.012,500,trig),trig)*ad(.0014,.5,8,trig) |> out($*1) 

// 808 Kick

melody=[e1, e1, f1, e1, e1, e1, d1, f1]

sine(melody[t])
  * ad(
      .001,2.1,4,
      trig:
        euclid(16, 16, bar:1)
        * tram('x--- -x-- x--x -x-x', 2)
    )
|> tanh($*8)
|> lp($,500)
|> out($*0.5)

// Snare

trig=tram('..x.',2/2) white(17,trig)+tri(#3*o2,trig) 
|> $*ad(.001,.5,28,trig) 
|> bps($,.6k,.9) 
|> bps($,1.4k,.75) 
|> bps($,7k,.7) 
|> clamp($*100,-0.4,.4) 
|> out($*0.55) 

//*Synth*

// Siren

env = ad(attack:0.001, decay:0.85, exponent:0, trig:every(4/1))
//Siren

sqr(a5 + -160*env) * env 
|> tanh($*10)
|> hp($,2k)
|> $+dattorro($*3)+delay($,0.76,0.3)
|> out($*0.12)

env = ad(attack:0.001, decay:0.7, exponent:0, trig:every(4/1))
//Siren
2

sqr(a4 + -120*env) * env 
|> tanh($*50)
|> hp($,3k)
|> $+dattorro($*3)+delay($,0.85,0.2)
|> out($*0.09)

env = ad(attack:0.001, decay:0.7, exponent:0, trig:every(4/1))
//Siren 3

sqr(a6 + -200*env) * env 
|> tanh($*20)
|> hp($,3k)
|> $+dattorro($*3)+delay($,0.85,0.2)
|> out($*0.08)

// TB-303 Lead

envelope=ad(attack:.001,decay:1,exponent:12.5,trig:every(1/8))
//Synth Bass

pos=t*1
note=[e1,e2,e0,g2,e1,e2,e0,e2][pos]
accent=[.7k,16.8k,.8k,.4k,.7k,5.8k,.8k,3k][pos]*.5 
slide=[1.8,.05,.8,.01,2,.08,.8,.01][pos]

ramp(note |> slew($,slide,.2,exp:2))

|> diodeladder($,
  cutoff:250+(accent |> slew($,.08,.06,3,))*envelope

    +fractal(123,.006)**4*5k,
  q:.98,
  k:0.0025,
  sat:0.9)

|> tanh($*20)

|> out($*.12)

name: Agony
code:
bpm=144 transpose=-2

trig=tram('x-x-x-x-') 

kick=sine(#5*o2+10k*ad(.00001,.02422,100,trig),trig)*ad(.001,.10,10,trig) 

kick |> out($)

trig=tram('xxx',1/2) tri(#1*o2)*ad(.02,.3,3,trig) |> $+delay($,.15,.5) |> compressor($,key:kick) |> out($*.3)

oh(.3) |> out($)

ch(.6,trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.1,.2,.8,.6][t*4] |> out($*.5)

trig=every(1/2,2.25/16)

#iii7sus4 |> $.map(hz->sine(hz*hz/2+sine(0.25k,trig)*500+200*ad(.01,.025,trig),trig)).avg()*ad(.00001,2.08,8,trig) |> out(.2*$)


mix=>compressor($)*2.2|>limiter($)

name: Desires
code:
bpm=144

scale='saba'

minimoog=hz->{
   saw(hz/2)*.7
  +sqr(hz*1.018)*.6
  +tri(hz*0.952)*.3
  |> $*.7 |> lpm($, 207, 1) |> tanh($*2) |> stereo($,.004) |> widen($,.0007)
}

bd(
  punch:10.3k,
  cutoff:95k,
  q:.62,
  fm:trig->ad(.00005,.09,200,trig),
  filter:trig->ad(.001,.1,100,trig),
  amp:trig->ad(.0032,.5,21,trig),
  phase:.52,
  offset:.01,
) |> bus(0,$)

bus(0) |> $+delay($,.11,.2)/2+delay($,.3,.2)/2 |> lp($,55)/2 |> bus(1,$)

chord=[#i7,#i7,#i7,#vi7][t].reverse()

chord.random(every(1/2))*o4 |> marimba($,trig:euclid(3,8,2)) |> bus(1,$*.3)

;(chord*o3).take(3).map(hz->marimba(hz,trig:euclid(5,8,1))).avg() |> bus(1,$*.3)

minimoog(chord[0]*o2)*ad(trig:euclid(5,8,1)) |> lp($,chord[0]*o3,1) |> bus(1,$*.2)

ch(0.2, trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.2,.2,.7,.8][t*4] |> bus(1,$*.4)

bus(0) |> out($)

bus(1) |> $+dattorro($) |> compressor($,att:.0001,rel:.16,thr:-21,ratio:5,knee:4,key:bus(0)) |> out($)

mix=>compressor($,thr:-13)*2 |> limiter($)

name: Oriental
code:
bpm=144

scale='saba' transpose=-2

minimoog=hz->{
   saw(hz/2)*.5
  +sqr(hz*1.018)*.4
  +tri(hz*0.952)*.6
  |> $*.7 |> lpm($, 207, 1) |> tanh($*2) |> stereo($,.004) |> widen($,.0007)
}

chord=[#i,#iv,#i,#ii][t/2]

trig=euclid(3,8,3)

chord.markov(trig) |> piano($*[o3,o4,o5].random(trig),trig) |> bus(1,$*.85)

;(chord*o4).map((hz,i)->piano(hz*(i==0?.5:1),trig)).avg() |> bus(1,$*.85)

minimoog(chord[0]*o2)*ad(trig:euclid(5,8,1)) |> lp($,chord[0]*o3,1) |> bus(1,$*.2)

bd(
  punch:13.3k,
  cutoff:95k,
  q:.62,
  fm:trig->ad(.00005,.09,200,trig),
  filter:trig->ad(.001,.1,100,trig),
  amp:trig->ad(.0032,.5,21,trig),
  phase:.52,
  offset:.01,
) |> bus(0,$)

bus(0) |> $+delay($,.11,.2)/2+delay($,.3,.2)/2 |> lp($,55)/2 |> bus(1,$)

bus(0) |> out($)

ch(0.44, trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.2,.2,.7,.8][t*4] |> bus(1,$*.4)

oh() |> bus(1,$*.5)

bus(1) |> $+dattorro($) |> compressor($,att:.0001,rel:.16,thr:-21,ratio:5,knee:4,key:bus(0)) |> out($)

name: Motion
code:
bpm=144

scale='saba'

minimoog=hz->{
   saw(hz/2)*.7
  +sqr(hz*1.018)*.6
  +tri(hz*0.952)*.3
  |> $*.7 |> lpm($, 207, 1) |> tanh($*2) |> stereo($,.004) |> widen($,.0007)
}

bd(
  punch:10.3k,
  cutoff:95k,
  q:.62,
  fm:trig->ad(.00005,.09,200,trig),
  filter:trig->ad(.001,.1,100,trig),
  amp:trig->ad(.0032,.5,21,trig),
  phase:.52,
  offset:.01,
) |> bus(0,$)

bus(0) |> $+delay($,.11,.2)/2+delay($,.3,.2)/2 |> lp($,55)/2 |> bus(1,$)

chord=[#i7,#i11,#i7,#iii7][t].reverse()

synth=(in,trig)->in|>sine($+sine($)*$*1.25)*.5+sqr($/2)*.4+tri($*2)*.7 |> lps($,300+5k*ad(e:5,trig),.8)*ad(e:2,trig) |> $+delay($,.5*co,.4)*.2

chord.markov(every(1/4))*o3 |> synth($,trig:euclid(3,8,1)) |> bus(1,$*.3)

pad=(in,trig)->in|>sine($+sine($*.4)*$*2.02)*ad(trig) |> lps($,400,.9)*.6

;(chord*o4).take(3).map(hz->pad(hz,trig:euclid(3,8,2))+pad(hz*4,trig:euclid(3,8,1))*.3).avg() |> bus(1,$*.3)

minimoog(chord[0]*o2)*ad(trig:euclid(5,8,1)) |> lp($,chord[0]*o3,1) |> bus(1,$*.2)

ch(0.2, trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.2,.2,.7,.8][t*4] |> bus(1,$*.4)

bus(0) |> out($)

bus(1) |> $+dattorro($) |> compressor($,att:.0001,rel:.16,thr:-21,ratio:5,knee:4,key:bus(0)) |> out($)

mix=>compressor($,thr:-13)*2 |> limiter($)

name: Rotate
code:
bpm=144

transpose=-7 scale='saba'

trig=every(1/4)

env=ad(.00001,1,30,trig)

sine(#5*o2+190k*env**180,.21,trig)*env |> lp($,100+8k*env**400) |> out($*.5)

env=ad(.03,.13,trig:euclid(3,8,0,1/2))

saw(#1*o2)*env |> lpm($,160,.05) |> out($*.45)

ch(.9,trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.1,.2,.8,.6][t*4] |> out($*.5)

oh(.15) |> out($)

trig=tram('x--x--x.',1) sine(80+160*ad(.001,.92,4,trig))*ad(.00001,.12,4,trig) |> out($*.28)

trig=tram('x--.--x.',1/2) #vi7sus4.shuffle(5).step(trig)*[o3,o4][t/4] |> sine($+sine($*(1+floor(lfosah(1)*10)))*$)*ad(trig) |> hp($,428,1.3) |> $+delay($,.18,.3) |> $+dattorro($) |> out($*.12)

mix=>compressor($)*2 |> limiter($)

name: Untitled
code:
drums() |> out($)

envelope=ad(attack:.001,decay:1,exponent:12.5,trig:every(1/8))

pos=t*2
note=[g1,g2,g0,b2][pos]
accent=[.7k,21.8k,.8k,.4k, .7k,12.8k,2.8k,.4k][pos]*.5 // <-- tweak this!
slide=[1.8,.03,.8,.01, 1.8,.8,1.8,.03][pos]

ramp(note |> slew($,slide,.1,exp:2)) // <-- try changing to sqr!

|> diodeladder($,
  cutoff:200+(accent |> slew($,.08,.06,3))*envelope

    +fractal(123,.006)**4*5k, // <-- and this!
  q:.98,
  k:0.0025,
  sat:.9
)
|> tanh($*25)

|> out($*.15)

name: Down
code:
bpm=144

transpose=-8 scale='dorian'

trig=every(1/4)

env=ad(.00001,1,30,trig)

sine(#5*o2+180k*env**180,.21,trig)*env |> lp($,100+8k*env**400) |> out($*.5)

env=ad(.02,.15,trig:euclid(5,8,0,1/2))

tri(#1*o2)*env |> lpm($,500) |> out($*.5)

trig=every(1/2,2/16)

#ii7sus4 |> $.map(hz->sine(hz*hz*hz/4+sine(1.0k)*300+400*ad(.06,.02,trig),trig)).avg()*ad(.00001,1.08,8,trig) |> out(.3*$)

trig=tram('-xx--xx-',1) sine(80+100*ad(.001,.92,4,trig))*ad(.00001,.12,4,trig) |> out($*.25)

ch(trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.1,.2,.8,.2][t*4] |> out($*.5)

oh() |> out($)

mix=>compressor($)*2 |> limiter($)

name: Disoriental
code:
bpm=144

scale='saba' transpose=-2

bd(#5*o2,trig:tram('x-x-x-x- x-x-x-x- x-x-x-x- xx-xx[xxx]-x',4)) |> out($)

tri(#1*o2)*ad(.01,.8,trig:euclid(5,8)) |> lpm($,184,1) |> out($*.25)

poly(3,euclid(3,8,3),trig->(#v7sus2*o3).markov(trig),marimba) |> $+dattorro($) |> out($*.9)

ch(.8,trig:tram('xxxx',1/4))*[.4,.4,.8,.5][t*4] |> out($*.62)

oh(.2)+sd() |> out($)

mix=>compressor($,thr:-13)*2 |> limiter($)

name: Ritual
code:
bpm=144 scale='saba' transpose=-2

kicksynth=(x,trig=1)->sine(x+10000*ad(.001,.92,344,trig),offset:.5,trig)*ad(.012,.8,11,trig)

kick=(y=52,trig=every(1/4))->sampler(record(.2,()->kicksynth(y)),trig,offset:.05)

kick(#1*o2,trig:tram('x-x-x-x- x-x-x-x- x-x-x-x- x-x-x-xx',4)) |> bus(0,$*.6)

minimoog=hz->{
   saw(hz/2)*.6
  +sqr(hz*1.018)*.4
  +tri(hz*0.952)*.3
  |> $*.8 |> lpm($, 113, 1) |> tanh($*3) |> stereo($,.002) |> widen($,.0003)
}

;[#1,#3].glide(1/2)*o2 |> minimoog($) |> lps($,130,.72) |> bus(1,$*.15)

fx=>sine($/8+sine($/4)*$)*ad(.01,4,2,trig:every(4))*0.2

fx(#6*o5) |> dattorro($,.7,.8,.9) |> bus(1,$*.8)

trig=tram('x--.--x-',2) #vi7sus4.shuffle(5).step(trig)*[o2,o3][t/3] |> sine($+sine($*(1+floor(lfosah(.5)*2)))*$)*ad(trig) |> hp($,528,1.3) |> $+delay($,.2,.3) |> $+dattorro($) |> out($*.3)

oh(.5,tram('..x. .x.. ..x. .X.[x.]',2)) |> chorus($,rate:4,spread:.3) |> stereo($,.012) |> bus(1,$*.5)

bus(0) |> out($)

bus(1) |> compressor($,thr:-22,key:bus(0)) |> out($*.5)

mix=>compressor($,thr:-18)*3 |> limiter($)

name: Hymn
code:
bpm=144 scale='saba' transpose=-3

kicksynth=(x,trig=1)->sine(x+18.6k*ad(.0038,.59,248,trig),offset:.5,trig)*ad(.014,.8,20,trig)

kick=(y=52,trig=every(1/4))->sampler(record(.4,()->kicksynth(y)),trig,offset:.02)

kick(#1*o2,trig:tram('x-x-x-x- x-x-x-x- x-x-x-x- x-x-x-xx',4)) |> compressor($,thr:-12)*3 |> limiter($) |> bus(0,$*.6)

;[#1,#3].glide(1/2)*o2 |> tri($) |> lp($,60,1.5) |> bus(1,$*.08)

;(#iv7sus4*o3).shuffle(11).walk(1/16) |> (sine($+sine($/1.02)*$*1.05)+sine($+sine($*4.02)*$*1.05)+sine($+sine($*12.02)*$*1.05))*ad(.010,.25,3,trig:every(1/4)) |> lp($,2k) |> $+dattorro($,.5,.8)*.24 |> hp($,277,3) |> bus(1,$*1.5)

oh(.5,tram('..x. .x.. ..x. .X.[x.]',2)) |> chorus($,rate:.255,spread:.3) |> stereo($,.012) |> bus(1,$*.8)

perc=>sine($/4+sine($/8)*$*2);perc(#1*o4)*ad(.006,.06,9,trig:tram('x-x-[xx]-[xxx]-',1/2)) |> bus(1,$*.4)

bus(0) |> out($)

bus(1) |> compressor($,att:.0001,rel:.50,thr:-41,ratio:8,knee:8,key:bus(0)) |> out($)


mix=>compressor($*.6,thr:-17)*3 |> limiter($)

name: Dreams
code:
bpm=144 transpose=-3 scale='saba'

trig=tram('x-x-x-x-') sine(#1*o2+100k*ad(.0009,.012,500,trig),trig)*ad(.0014,.5,8,trig) |> out($)

trig=tram('-x',1/4) gauss(98,trig)*ad(.006,.32,4,trig) |> hps($,12k,.75) |> out($)

trig=tram('xx-X',1/4) gauss(5,trig)*ad(.001,.09,4,trig) |> hps($,12k,.75)*.1 |> out($)

trig=tram('---x',1/2) ;(white(11,trig)+tri(#3*o2)*1)*ad(.001,.24,28,trig)*.9 |> bps($,1.8k,.5) |> out($*.7)

trig=tram('-x-x-x-[xxx]') sine([180,300,500].random(every(1/16)))*ad(.001,.02,trig)*.3 |> out($*1.2)

trig=tram('x--.--x-',1/2) #vi7sus4.shuffle(15).step(trig)*[o2,o3][t/3] |> sine($+sine($*(1+floor(lfosah(.5)*15)))*$)*ad(trig) |> hp($,328,1.3) |> $+delay($,.2,.3) |> $+dattorro($) |> out($*.3)

;[#1,#3].glide(1/2)*o2 |> tri($) |> out($*.08)

mix=>compressor($,thr:-20)*2 |> limiter($)

name: Deep
code:
scale='hex' transpose=[2,2,2,2, 2,2,2,2, 2,2,2,2, 2,2,21,23][t/1]

synth=>sine($/.54+sine($*1.98)*$*2.52)

oversample(3,()->((#vi7sus4*o1).map(synth).avg()/7+(#vi7sus4*o2).map(synth).avg()/18)

|> hps($,364,.90) |> lps($,123,.93) |> hs($,845,q:2,gain:36)) |> bus(1,$)

kicksynth=(x,trig=1)->sine(x+18000*ad(.001,.8,300,trig),offset:.5,trig)*ad(.012,.8,16,trig)

kick=(y=52,trig=every(1/4))->sampler(record(.2,()->kicksynth(y)),trig,offset:.05)  

kick(trig:every(1/4)) |> lp($,60,2.7) |> bus(0,$)

ch(w:.5,trig:tram('--x-',1/4)) |> bus(1,$)

snare=(trig)->sampler(record(.155,()->{sdsynth(seed:1142,trig:step(.06,dec()))|>$+fdn($,.8,.7,.3,.2)}),trig)

snare(trig:tram('-x',1/2)) |> out($)

trig:=tram('--[xxx]---x-',1/2) sine(69+99*ad(.001,.84,2,trig))*ad(.00001,.12,6,trig) |> bus(1,$)

bus(0) |> out($)

bus(1) |> compressor($,thr:-22,key:bus(0)) |> out($*.5)



mix=>compressor($,thr:-25)*6 |> limiter($)

name: Tribal
code:
bpm=144 scale='saba' transpose=-3

kicksynth=(x,trig=1)->sine(x+21654*ad(.001,.92,344,trig),offset:.5,trig)*ad(.012,.8,11,trig)

kick=(y=52,trig=every(1/4))->sampler(record(.2,()->kicksynth(y)),trig,offset:.05)

kick(#1*o2,trig:every(1/4)) |> bus(0,$*.6)

ch(.47,step(.61,swing(t,65)*4%1))*[.6,.2,.8,1.3][swing(t*4,.65)] |> bus(1,$*.9)

tri([#1,#3][t]*o2) |> lp($,65,3) |> bus(1,$*.08)

trig:=tram('x---x-[xxx]-',1/2) sine(#1*o3+#12*o3*ad(.001,.11,2,trig))*ad(.00001,.12,6,trig) |> bus(1,$*.2)

synth=>oversample(4,()->sine($/4+sine($/1)*$*5))*ad(.0001,.06,6,trig:euclid(10,12))

synth(#2*o3)+synth(#20*o3)*.4 |> $+delay($,.30,.34,x->hp(x,3150,.7))*.5 |> bus(1,$*.23)

pad=>oversample(4,()->sine($+sine($)*$));(#iv9sus4*o4).map(pad).avg() |> bus(2,$*.07)

bus(0) |> out($*1)

bus(1) |> compressor($,thr:-22,key:bus(0)) |> out($*.5)

bus(2) |> compressor($,thr:-47,rel:.4,key:bus(0)) |> out($*.9)



mix=>compressor($,thr:-16)*5 |> limiter($)

name: Little techno
code:
bpm=144

kicksynth=(x,trig=1)->sine(x+18000*ad(.001,.8,300,trig),offset:.5,trig)*ad(.012,.8,16,trig)

kick=(y=52,trig=every(1/4))->sampler(record(.2,()->kicksynth(y)),trig,offset:.05)

kick(52,trig:every(1/4)) |> out($)

trig=every(1/8) synth=>oversample(4,()->sine($+sine($/2)*$)*ad(.0001,.5,3,trig)*.2)

mel=[61,62,65,67,71,60]

mel[t*4] |> ntof($)     |> synth($) |> out(    $)

mel[t*4] |> ntof($+65)  |> synth($) |> out($/1.5)

mel[t*4] |> ntof($+.65) |> synth($) |> out($/2.5)

trig=tram('x-x-x-[xxx]-',1/2) sine(80+100*ad(.001,.92,4,trig))*ad(.00001,.12,4,trig) |> out($*.75)

ch(334) |> out($)

oh() |> out($)

mix=>lp($,200)




mix=>$*.5

name: Mystic
code:
bpm=144

mel=[60,62,66]

synth=>sine($/2+sine($/3*12)*$/2)

mel[t*4] |> ntof($) |> synth($/4) |> out($/3)

mel[t*4] |> ntof($) |> synth($*11.1) |> out($/68)

kicksynth=(x,trig=1)->sine(x+16800*ad(.0008,.7,287,trig),offset:.5,trig)*ad(.012,.6,13,trig)

kicksynth(54,trig:every(1/4)) |> out(       $)

mix=>lp($,200)




mix=>$*.7
